output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(COUNT(?medal) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?athlete wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
  ?athlete wdt:P27 wd:Q38 .
  ?athlete wdt:P166 ?medal .
}
GROUP BY ?athlete
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
